sentences.arabic: بَدَأَتِ الْمَدِينَةُ مَشْرُوعَ تَجْمِيلِ الشَّوَارِعِ الرَّئِيسِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Grad je pokrenuo projekat uljepšavanja glavnih ulica.
sentences.translationEn: The city started a project to beautify the main streets.

sentences.arabic: رُسِمَتْ لَوْحَاتٌ مُلَوَّنَةٌ عَلَى جُدْرَانِ الشَّوَارِعِ.
sentences.translation: Na zidovima ulica nacrtane su šarene slike.
sentences.translationEn: Colorful murals were painted on the walls of the streets.

sentences.arabic: رَكَّبَتِ الْبَلَدِيَّةُ إِضَاءَةً جَدِيدَةً فِي كُلِّ شَارِعٍ.
sentences.translation: Općina je postavila novo osvjetljenje u svakoj ulici.
sentences.translationEn: The municipality installed new lighting in every street.

sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَتِ الشَّوَارِعُ أَجْمَلَ وَأَكْثَرَ أَمَانًا فِي اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Ulice su postale ljepše i sigurnije noću.
sentences.translationEn: The streets became more beautiful and safer at night.
